caption: A news report from News18 India features a sequence of shots showing a group of men in a brightly lit indoor hallway. Several men are visible, mostly wearing light-colored button-down shirts; one man in the center wears a white shirt and appears to be moving forward. The scene is overlaid with several news graphics. The top banner reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "NEWS 18 इंडिया". Small circular portraits of several men accompany labels such as " डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". A red ticker at the bottom states "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजेन्द्र यादव" and displays the time "10:03 PM" alongside the word "MAHARASHTRA". As the sequence progresses, the camera follows the men as they walk through the hallway, with some figures appearing blurred due to motion.
